1: import { WebSocketServer, WebSocket } from "ws";
2: import type { Server } from "http";
3: 
4: type WSClient = {
5:   ws: WebSocket;
6:   isAlive: boolean;
7: };
8: 
9: let wss: WebSocketServer;
10: const clients = new Map<WebSocket, WSClient>();
11: 
12: export function initWebSocket(httpServer: Server) {
13:   wss = new WebSocketServer({ server: httpServer, path: "/ws" });
14: 
15:   wss.on("connection", (ws: WebSocket) => {
16:     clients.set(ws, { ws, isAlive: true });
17: 
18:     ws.on("pong", () => {
19:       const client = clients.get(ws);
20:       if (client) client.isAlive = true;
21:     });
22: 
23:     ws.on("close", () => {
24:       clients.delete(ws);
25:     });
26: 
27:     ws.on("error", (err) => {
28:       console.error("WebSocket error:", err);
29:       clients.delete(ws);
30:     });
31:   });
32: 
33:   const interval = setInterval(() => {
34:     wss?.clients.forEach((ws) => {
35:       const client = clients.get(ws);
36:       if (client && !client.isAlive) {
37:         ws.terminate();
38:         clients.delete(ws);
39:         return;
40:       }
41:       client!.isAlive = false;
42:       ws.ping();
43:     });
44:   }, 30000);
45: 
46:   wss.on("close", () => {
47:     clearInterval(interval);
48:   });
49: 
50:   console.log("WebSocket server initialized on /ws");
51: }
52: 
53: export type WSEventType = 
54:   | "ORDER_CREATED"
55:   | "ORDER_UPDATED"
56:   | "ORDER_DELETED"
57:   | "KITCHEN_ORDER_CREATED"
58:   | "KITCHEN_ORDER_UPDATED"
59:   | "KITCHEN_ORDER_DELETED";
60: 
61: export interface WSEvent {
62:   type: WSEventType;
63:   data: any;
64: }
65: 
66: export function broadcast(event: WSEvent) {
67:   if (!wss) return;
68:   
69:   const message = JSON.stringify(event);
70:   clients.forEach(({ ws }) => {
71:     if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
72:       ws.send(message);
73:     }
74:   });
75: }
